items.name: Crazy Color Black T with Blue Cross
items.description: Make a statement without saying a word. This bold black tee is stamped with Crazy Color’s iconic logo on the back and their signature blue cross on the front, serving rebellious energy and street-style edge. It’s the go-to look for dye-hards, rule-breakers and anyone repping colour with confidence.
